message:
feat(wizard): add filesystem orientation guide

Adds 'Finding Your Way Around' section to launch-onboarding page with:
- Home folder explanation (~)
- lsd for listing files
- cd for navigation (enter/go back)
- rg/fd for searching
- zoxide tip for fast jumping

Uses magenta color scheme to distinguish from other guides.

Closes: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-k80e

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
